sections.title: Welcome to Safety and Environment
sections.description:
This SmartUrbanity questionnaire focuses on perceived safety, security and environmental conditions during your journeys. Your answers help us understand which street and urban factors influence comfort, risk and accessibility. Participation is voluntary and anonymous.

https://www.smarturbanity.com/about

sections.title: Safety Perception
sections.description: Questions about how safe and secure you feel during your journeys.

questions.text: How secure do you feel on your regular trip?
What factors most reduce your sense of security? (Select up to 3 options.)

options.text: Lack of people around (isolated or deserted areas)
Presence of suspicious or aggressive individuals
Poor visibility (e.g., blind corners, obstructed views)
Poor maintenance (e.g., abandoned buildings, graffiti, broken infrastructure)
Lack of surveillance or security measures (e.g., no cameras, no staff)
Previous personal or reported incidents in the area

questions.text: How safe do you think your daily environment is?
Which of the following situations on a trip do you consider unsafe? (Select up to 3 options.)

options.text: Lack of dedicated infrastructure (e.g. Cycle paths, Walking paths)
Road surface in poor condition or obstacles (e.g. potholes,debris)
Poor visibility (e.g. blind spots,parked vehicles obstructing your view)
Conflicts with parked vehicles (e.g. opening doors,sudden movements)

questions.text: How comfortable do you generally feel, in terms of peace and stress?

sections.title: Environmental Factors
sections.description: Questions about how your surroundings affect your travel experience.

questions.text: Thinking about your daily commute, to what extent does noise from traffic bother or annoy you?
How do the air quality or pollution levels (eg. exhaust fumes, dust, or unpleasant odors) affect your journey?

options.text: I notice it but it doesn't change my behaviour
It makes me adjust how I travel (e.g. mask, closed windows)
It makes me change my route or travel at a different time
It makes me switch to a different mode of transport entirely

questions.text: If the weather is poor (eg, rain, wind, cold, sun), how likely are you to switch from your usual travel mode to a different one?
How does the cleanliness or maintenance of the paths and facilities (eg, litter, smells, or broken glass) affect your journey?

options.text: It puts me off using this route entirely
It makes me avoid certain stops or sections of the route
It makes the journey unpleasant but I still use the route
I notice it but carry on as usual
No effect on how I travel

questions.text: How much does the visual appeal (architecture, public art, or general 'vibe') of your surroundings influence your travel?

options.text: I do not pay attention to the visual environment at all
Unpleasant surroundings negatively affect my experience, but I still use the same route
I notice the surroundings, but they do not affect my mood or travel decisions
Pleasant surroundings improve my mood during the trip, but rarely affect my route choice
I actively choose routes because they are visually appealing or interesting
